account.note:
Computer sound noise music, new media, performance. Beats, noise, bass, kinky textures, & nyabinary space.

Also known as Luka Prinčič.

Gender-blender non-conforming kinkster. Posthuman transfeminist, plant-based, anti-capitalist, commoner, critical engineer. White, able-bodied, slavic/slovenian of jewish & romani descent.

Running Kamizdat boutique #CreativeCommons netlabel, employed at Emanat institute, Ljubljana

This profile is on single-user self-hosted instance of GoToSocial, part of the Fediverse. Otherwise Mastodon class of 2017. Online communication is messy and complicated. Let me know if you think I fucked up, I'm happy to learn. Network cultures since FIDONET, monochromatic text monitor, XT/286, and low-baud modem. Computer music since Scream Tracker 2 w/ COVOX.

Do NOT include this profile in any starter pack without permission.
Nazis, transphobes, misogynists, and other right-wing scum can fuck off.

#FairTradeMusic #FediWave #BeYourOwnPlatform #ElectronicMusic #ExperimentalMusic #MusicProduction #Music #nobot #nobots #TakaSnKakaSn

card.title: Russia launches new Soyuz-5 rocket from Baikonur in first test flight
card.description: On Thursday, April 30, at 23:00 local time (Astana), the Baikonur Cosmodrome witnessed the first test launch of the Soyuz-5/Sunkar vehicle. The rocket lifted off from Site 45 as part of flight development tests, according to Kazakhstan’s Ministry of AI and Digital Development.
card.image_description: Russia launches new Soyuz-5 rocket from Kazakhstan cosmodrome in first test flight

content:
#WordWeavers How much longer do you think it’ll take you to finish your WIP?

The last two were solid - I'm happy with them - but they're shortish, and sort of light. The one I'm starting will be longer, and really dense, experimental and weird. I don't know how long it'll take - I don't really think about that sort of thing. A while, I suppose.
